name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent receipt management causes delayed payments. We automate receipt verification and categorization instead of manual tracking and submission of receipts.
problem_solved: Inconsistent receipt management and delayed invoice submissions.
